  1. com.yishape.lab.math.hpc

  3. LpNonnegativeResult

Uses of Record Class
com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.LpNonnegativeResult

Packages that use LpNonnegativeResult
Package
Description
com.yishape.lab.math.hpc
YiShape Math HPC：通过 JDK FFM 调用原生库 yishape_math_rust（faer 稠密线代 + HiGHS 线性规划）， 针对主库 yishape-math 中纯 Java 或可选 OpenBLAS 仍显吃力的场景。
com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal
供 YishapeHpc 使用的内部实现：不应作为稳定对外 API 依赖。

  • Uses of LpNonnegativeResult in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc

    Methods in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc that return LpNonnegativeResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static LpNonnegativeResult
    YishapeHpc.lpMixedIntegerNonnegative(double[] c, double[][] aUb, double[] bUb, double[][] aEq, double[] bEq, int[] integrality)
    稠密非负 MILP：在 YishapeHpc.lpNonnegative(double[], double[][], double[], double[][], double[]) 相同约束下，按 integrality[j] 指定列类型： 0 连续，1 非负整数，2 0-1。
    static LpNonnegativeResult
    YishapeHpc.lpNonnegative(double[] c, double[][] aUb, double[] bUb, double[][] aEq, double[] bEq)
    稠密非负 LP：最小化 cᵀx，s.t.
    static LpNonnegativeResult
    YishapeHpc.lpSparse(double[] c, double[] colLb, double[] colUb, LpCsrMatrix a, double[] rowLb, double[] rowUb)
    稀疏 CSR 形式 LP：约束矩阵为 m×n，非零结构由 LpCsrMatrix 描述； 列界、行界与 HiGHS 语义一致（可为 ±∞ 表示无界）。

  • Uses of LpNonnegativeResult in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal

    Methods in com.yishape.lab.math.hpc.internal that return LpNonnegativeResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static LpNonnegativeResult
    YishapeMathRust.lpMinimizeMixedIntegerNonnegative(int n, int mLe, int mEq, double[] c, double[] aUbColMajor, double[] bUb, double[] aEqColMajor, double[] bEq, int[] integrality)
    稠密非负 MILP；integrality 与 YishapeHpc.lpMixedIntegerNonnegative(double[], double[][], double[], double[][], double[], int[]) 一致。
    static LpNonnegativeResult
    YishapeMathRust.lpMinimizeNonnegative(int n, int mLe, int mEq, double[] c, double[] aUbColMajor, double[] bUb, double[] aEqColMajor, double[] bEq)
    稠密非负 LP：目标与约束数组均为列主序行块（与 YishapeHpc.lpNonnegative(double[], double[][], double[], double[][], double[]) 一致）。
    static LpNonnegativeResult
    YishapeMathRust.lpMinimizeSparseCsr(int n, int m, int nnz, double[] c, double[] colLb, double[] colUb, int[] rowPtr, int[] colInd, double[] aVals, double[] rowLb, double[] rowUb)
    稀疏 CSR LP；数组布局与 HiGHS 封装约定一致，rowPtr 长度 m+1 且 rowPtr[0]=0、rowPtr[m]=nnz。
